query: Implement the approved plan phase by phase and verify every phase.
Execute the saved implementation plan, commit each authorized phase, and run the review/fix loop.
Apply the confirmed code-review fixes and re-review until there are no actionable findings.
Use $numados-implementation to finish this planned change.
Research the task and record context before planning.
Turn the approved research into a phased plan.
Review the current diff without changing files.
Write a conventional commit message only.
